query: Silverton Ski Marathon cross country ski race Silverton

videos.title: Silverton Alpine Marathon Snow Update 2019
videos.description:
Silverton and the San Juan's saw near record snowpack levels this year which has caused avalanches around the Silverton Alpine Marathon course. The good news is there's about one kilometer that's good runnable snow and the rest of the course is clear and beautiful!

Check out this drone shot of the slide about 10 miles in to the marathon and about a half marathon distance in to it for the 50k runners. 


Sign up for this year's event https://www.aravaiparunning.com/races/

videos.title: Thousands Take to The Snow as The Engadin Ski Marathon Returns
videos.description:
#EACNews #EACNewsខេមរភាសា #Breakingnews #HotNews 
Thousands Take to The Snow as The Engadin Ski Marathon Returns  
INTERNATIONAL: After a two-year break due to the coronavirus pandemic, over 11, 000 competitors from 40 nations lined up to take part in the 52nd Engadin Ski marathon in Switzerland on Sunday 13TH March.

Known as the second-largest cross-country skiing event in the world, thousands were attracted to Grisons high valley to conquer the 42-km long marathon route from Maloja to S-chanf.

In the men’s elite race, Roman Furger, fresh off an 11th-place finish in the 50km race at the Beijing Olympics, sealed a fourth win in the competition, with the Swiss crossing the line ahead of veteran countryman Dario Cologna, and France’s Tom Mancini third.

On the women’s side, local Nadja Kalin from St. Moritz was a surprise winner as the 20-year-old clinched victory ahead of French pair Celine Chopard and Enora Latuilliere.
................................................................................................................

videos.title: Tristan (7) ski racing in Sun Valley.
Aspen Backcountry Marathon
videos.channel: City of Aspen Parks & Recreation Department
videos.description: Boasting spectacular views of the Elk Mountains and the city of Aspen, Colorado below, the Aspen Backcountry Marathon is run almost exclusively on high country dirt trails. Challenging ascents, exciting descents and wide diversity in terrain will challenge even the most well trained athlete.
videos.transcript:
[Music]
we're here in Wagner Park in Aspen

videos.title: 2015 City of Lakes Loppet 2 dog skijor race
videos.description: This is the Chuck and Dons two dog skijor race at the City of Lakes Loppet.  This was our 2nd day run.  My dog Pasha is not having a good run.  I think he was under the weather a bit because he gave me problems on day one also.  There could be other underlying issues, but he did not have a good weekend.  He'll get rest and love over the next several days before having to do it all over again this weekend.

videos.title: Silverton Skijoring 2019 - Adrenaline Cowgirl
videos.description:
I had a rollercoaster of emotions shooting this documentary for my friend, Jasmine. We lost a very good friend during the filming of this event. My heart goes out to Steph, who skied after hearing this heartbreaking news. Life is short, do what you love. 
 
We dedicate this film to Woody. RIP my friend. 

Music- Stillhouse Junkies - “Whiskey Prison”
